scripts.check: npm run check:database && npm run check:backend && npm run check:web
scripts.check:backend: npm run check:python && npm run check:gateway
scripts.check:database: npm run db:validate && npm run db:generate
scripts.check:python: PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=.cache/python python3 -m compileall services/auth/app services/embedding/app services/ingestion/app services/retrieval/app
scripts.check:web: npm run lint:web && npm run build:web
scripts.dev:backend: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up --build -d postgres redis qdrant rabbitmq minio auth ingestion embedding retrieval gateway
